title: CRISIS COUNSELING HOTLINE - 211info
text: WHITE BIRD CLINIC CRISIS COUNSELING HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers over-the-phone crisis counseling and provides information and referral for other local resources. 323 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals in crisis Hours: 7 days per week 9am-5pm Email (541) 687-4000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis Line (541) 687-4000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for services FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene and Springfield SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Downtown on 12th Avenue between High Street and Mill Street Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - BIRTH CERTIFICATES HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NEST MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CAHOOTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WHITE BIRD CLINIC
